blended.narrative: Panorama Mountain is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 2.3 inches of wet, heavy snow expected. Snow levels around 7,080 ft. Looking ahead, 14 inches possible over the next 14 days.

Thursday: 3.9" of snow, highs of 36°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Monday: 2.1" of snow, highs of 37°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
